'''Runaway Prince''', called '''Lordunkee Wanpolla''' in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]],<ref name="TEA" /> was an uninhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] which the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] gave to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. The origin of its peculiar name was lost in history.

When the Hutts first arrived, they squeezed the planet dry of all of its natural resources in a matter of months, making it a bog world like [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the planet was one of the many given as a token of goodwill to the extragalactic invaders. The Yuuzhan Vong then terraformed Runaway Prince to suit themselves and turned the planet into a [[yorik coral]] production facility. [[Villip]]s were also grown on the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
